evals.prompt: Deploy the Citizens Bank demo. The .env is ready.
evals.expected_output: bootstrap.py generated and executed. All 4 indices created, seed data loaded with demo-critical docs verified, ELSER endpoint deployed and warmed. Deploy log confirms complete.
assertions: bootstrap.py generated in workspace with all 15 steps implemented
Script reads credentials from .env, never hardcodes them
DEPLOYMENT_TYPE from .env drives ILM vs DSL decision in script
Each step is idempotent (checks existence before creating)
Demo-critical documents individually verified after bulk load
ELSER endpoint check included — waits for allocation before continuing
Deploy log written with artifact table and doc counts

evals.prompt: Deploy the Lowe's demo to a shared cluster. INDEX_PREFIX=lowes- is set in the .env.
evals.expected_output: bootstrap.py applies lowes- prefix to all index names, pipeline names, template names. ML jobs created with prefixed IDs. Kibana saved objects patched with prefix before import.
assertions: All index names in bootstrap.py use p(name) helper with PREFIX applied
ML job ID is lowes-inventory-shrink-monitor (not inventory-shrink-monitor)
Kibana index patterns patched from store-transactions to lowes-store-transactions
Enrich policy execute step uses prefixed policy name
Deploy log shows prefixed artifact names throughout
